productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Olive Floral Design Tights
description: Composition Opaque brown footed tights made of a stretchable polyester cotton blended fabric, with soft elastic waist and knitted patterning Fit Slim Wash care Hand wash or machine wash Tights from united colors of benetton for those interested in keeping it stylish during winter. Forget your boring old leggings and opt for the more feminine choice - tights! Wear this with dresses and skirts and throw on a jacket for added style. Pair this with closed flats or boots.
